title: Prototype Pollution (Node)
description: PrefsHub deep-merges your JSON body into a session prefs object. Pollute Object.prototype.isAdmin to unlock /admin.

hints.text: JSON.parse keeps __proto__ as an own property of the parsed object — a naive recursive merge over Object.keys() lands the assignment on Object.prototype.
POST /prefs with body {"__proto__":{"isAdmin":true}}. Then GET /admin — your session has no own isAdmin, but the prototype lookup finds one now.
